prompt: Pre-commit check in appsmith-v2: here's the display-name update scenario plus my code changes (in member.md attached). Verify this scenario against the Gherkin before I commit.
expectations: Confirms the display_name then-clauses (200, returns updated display_name, persisted) are satisfied
Explicitly flags that the implementation drifted outside this scenario by adding things the scenario never called for: marketing_emails_opt_in handling (and sending an email) and theme_preference
Identifies the out-of-scope additions concretely by name rather than vaguely noting 'extra code'
Stays a focused gate scoped to this one scenario: does not turn into a full-feature audit or a principle-by-principle architecture critique
